title: Jerry Mod
body:
The mod is dedicated to _the best_ npc Jerry in Hypixel Skyblock. Even though no content is related to skyblock.
It adds some add-on content to vanilla minecraft, which makes the late game less boring, I guess.

Some key feature in the mod:
- 6 new dimensions!
- exclusive loots, enchants, tools and mobs in each dimension

- _Unique Bosses_ in each dimension

- some cursed items and wands

- and so on!

(Oh yea it is my first ever (big) mod, so many stuff could be buggy, feels free to report it :D)
